name: ial-build

metadata.name: ial-build
metadata.summary: IAL-build: Tools for Source Code Management and build of IAL code.

documentation:
IAL-build
=========

*Tools for Source Code Management and build of IAL code.*

This package wraps around IAL git repo management, bundling (ecbundle package) and build systems
(for now gmkpack only) to help transitioning from source code to IAL binary executables.
It provides a python package to do so, as well as a set of command-line tools.

Dependencies
------------

* `ecbundle` : https://github.com/ecmwf/ecbundle
* Some functionalities may also clone and use [IAL-bundle](https://github.com/ACCORD-NWP/IAL-bundle). If you don't have internet connection at time of use, you may have to specify a local, pre-cloned, origin repository for IAL-bundle, using env variable `DEFAULT_IALBUNDLE_REPO`, e.g. `DEFAULT_IALBUNDLE_REPO=~/repositories/IAL-bundle`

Installation
------------

* on `belenos`:

  ```
  module use ~mary/public/modulefiles
  module load ecbundle
  module load IAL-build
  ```

* at CNRM:
  - install `ecbundle`, e.g. `pip3 install --user git+https://github.com/ecmwf/ecbundle`
  - ```
    IAL_BUILD_PACKAGE=/home/common/epygram/public/IAL-build/default
    export PATH=$IAL_BUILD_PACKAGE/bin:$PATH
    export PYTHONPATH=$IAL_BUILD_PACKAGE/src:$PYTHONPATH
    ```
  
* in general:
  - install `ecbundle`, e.g. `pip3 install git+https://github.com/ecmwf/ecbundle`
  - Clone this repo, then add paths to the package:
    ```
    export PATH=<path to package>/bin:$PATH
    export PYTHONPATH=<path to package>/src:$PYTHONPATH
    ```

Documentation
-------------

(tbc) 

* cache dir
* gmkpack specificities (src/local, hub, ...)

Tools
-----

In the `bin/` directory, the `ial-*` commands can help finding bundles, create IAL branches and make packs (gmkpack) from bundles or IAL branches.
They are auto-documented, see their argument `-h`.

Some examples:

### Prepare a bundle for a personal branch

* Find a bundle appropriate for my IAL branch <my_branch>, based on CY50:
  ```
  % ial-find_bundle my_branch
  BDL50-default
  ```

* Get this bundle:
  ```
  % ial-get_bundle BDL50-default [-t my_bundle.yml]
  ```

* Edit and replace `CY50` in `my_bundle.yml`

* Create a root pack from my bundle:
  ```
  % ial-bundle2pack my_bundle.yml [...pack creation arguments, cf. -h]
  ```

### Install a root pack of `BDL50-default`

```
ial-bundle2pack BDL50-default
```
will:
* look for a bundle tagged `BDL50-default` in the [IAL-bundle](https://github.com/ACCORD-NWP/IAL-bundle) repository,
* download it
* clone/fetch/checkout each package referenced in the bundle in the requested version, in a cache local directory (cf. option `-d`)
* create a pack (by default: main)
* populate the pack with the source codes checkedout for each package

### Install a root(=main) pack for the recommended (default) bundle for CY50

```
ial-git2pack -t main CY50 [...]
```
will:
* find a bundle appropriate for CY50 in IAL-bundle repository
* then do the same as `ial-bundle2pack`

### Install an incremental pack with the content of my IAL branch on top of its most recent official ancestor pack
```
ial-git2pack my_branch
```

documentation: Building executables algorithms.
!/usr/bin/env python
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: ial_build.algos.IALgitref2pack
documentation:
Make a pack out of an **IAL_git_ref** within an **IAL_repo_path** repository.
If IAL_git_ref==None, take the currently checkedout ref.
An IAL bundle may be necessary (determined and cloned on the fly) for main packs hub packages.

```
param IAL_bundle_origin_repo

URL of IAL-bundle repository to clone, in which to look for bundle tag.
Can be local (e.g. ~user/IAL-bundle)
or distant (e.g. https://github.com/ACCORD-NWP/IAL-bundle.git).

param IAL_bundle_tag_for_hub

tag of a bundle to be used for the hub (guessed if not provided).

param bundle_cache_dir

cache directory in which to download/update repositories for the hub

param bundle_update

if bundle repositories are to be updated/checkedout

param pack_type

type of pack, among ('incr', 'main')

param preexisting_pack

assume the pack already preexists

param clean_if_preexisting

if True, call cleanpack before populating a preexisting pack

param compiler_label

Gmkpack's compiler label to be used

param compiler_flag

Gmkpack's compiler flag to be used

param homepack

directory in which to build pack

param rootpack

diretory in which to look for root pack (incr packs only)
```

functions.name: ial_build.algos.bundle_file2pack
documentation:
Make a pack out of a bundle file.

```
param bundle_file

path of a bundle file
```

--- bundle download
\:param src_dir: directory in which to download/update repositories
\:param update: if repositories are to be updated/checkedout
--- pack
\:param pack_type: type of pack, among ('incr', 'main')
\:param preexisting_pack: assume the pack already preexists
\:param clean_if_preexisting: if True, call cleanpack before populating a preexisting pack
\:param compiler_label: Gmkpack's compiler label to be used
\:param compiler_flag: Gmkpack's compiler flag to be used
\:param homepack: directory in which to build pack
\:param rootpack: diretory in which to look for root pack (incr packs only)

functions.name: ial_build.algos.bundle_tag2pack
documentation:
Make a pack out of a bundle tag.

```
param IAL_bundle_tag

tag of a bundle in IAL-bundle repo

param IAL_bundle_origin_repo

URL of IAL-bundle repository to clone, in which to look for bundle tag.
Can be local (e.g. ~user/IAL-bundle)
or distant (e.g. https://github.com/ACCORD-NWP/IAL-bundle.git).
```

--- other arguments:
cf. bundle_file2pack "bundle download" and "pack" arguments

functions.name: ial_build.algos.IALgitref2pack_via_IALbundle
documentation:
Make a pack out of a bundle tag.

```
param IAL_bundle_tag

tag of a bundle in IAL-bundle repo

param IAL_bundle_origin_repo

URL of IAL-bundle repository to clone, in which to look for bundle tag.
Can be local (e.g. ~user/IAL-bundle)
or distant (e.g. https://github.com/ACCORD-NWP/IAL-bundle.git).
```

--- other arguments:
cf. bundle_file2pack "bundle download" and "pack" arguments

methods.name: ial_build.bundle.IALbundleRepo.find_bundle_tags_for_IAL_git_ref
documentation:
Find the most recent bundle tag(s) in IAL-bundle repository, available for **IAL_git_ref** ancestors.
Ancestors are looked for in **IAL_repo_path**.
If IAL_git_ref==None, take the currently checkedout ref.

methods.name: ial_build.bundle.IALbundleRepo.print_bundle_tags_for_IAL_git_ref
documentation:
Find the most recent bundle tag(s) in IAL-bundle repository, available for **IAL_git_ref** ancestors.
Ancestors are looked for in **IAL_repo_path**.
If IAL_git_ref==None, take the currently checkedout ref.

methods.name: ial_build.bundle.IALbundleRepo.get_bundle_for_IAL_git_ref
documentation:
Get bundle from IAL-bundle repository, coherent with the given **IAL_git_ref** ancestors.
Get the most recent bundle in IAL-bundle repository, available for **IAL_git_ref** ancestors.
Raise an error if several are found.
Ancestors are looked for in **IAL_repo_path**.
If IAL_git_ref==None, take the currently checkedout ref.

```
param to_file

path/name in which to get the bundle file
if '__tmp__', a unique random file is used
if '__tag__, the file is ./<bundle_tag>.yml
Can also be sys.stdout

param overwrite

to allow overwriting of existing target file
```

methods.name: ial_build.bundle.IALbundleRepo.get_bundle
documentation:
Get required bundle from IAL-bundle repository.

```
param to_file

path/name in which to get the bundle file

if '__tag__, the file is ./<bundle_tag>.yml
Can also be sys.stdout

```

Temporary IALbundleRepo, cloned from **origin_repo** in directory **in_dir**.

Warning ! In any case, the clone repository is deleted when this object is deleted.

home of packs

add /bin to path, in case abspath=True

methods.name: ial_build.repositories.GitProxy.fork_point
documentation:
Get the oldest "diverging" common ancestor to refA and refB,
or in other words, the commit before the first diverging commit in refs respective histories.

From https://stackoverflow.com/questions/1527234/finding-a-branch-point-with-git

diff -u <(git rev-list --first-parent topic)                 <(git rev-list --first-parent master) | sed -ne 's/^ //p' | head -1

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.tag_of_latest_official_ancestor
documentation: Tag of latest official ancestor.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_path_for
documentation: Path of the compilation script for **program**.
Methods around *ics_* compilation scripts -----------------------------------

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_remove
documentation: Remove the compilation script for **program**.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_available_for
documentation: Whether the compilation script exists for **program**.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_build_for
documentation:
Build the 'ics\_\*' script for **program**.

```
param silent

mute gmkpack command
```

Other arguments used to be passed to tune_ics(...) method; this method is now to be called independently.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_tune
documentation:
Tune the 'ics\_\*' script for **program**.

```
param GMK_THREADS

number of threads with which gmkpack will compile (recommended: 10)

param Ofrt

optimization level, e.g. 4 for nominal or 2 for bound-checking

param partition

jobs scheduler partition

param no_compilation

switch off compilation

param no_libs_update

switch off update of libraries
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_ignore_files
documentation:
Add **list_of_files** to be ignored to ics_program.

```
param list_of_files

a list of filenames,
or a filename of a file containing the list of filenames
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ics_available
documentation: Lists the available ics_ compilation scripts.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._ics_modify
documentation:
Modify the ics_program script.

```
param pattern

a re.compile() pattern or a string;
if line matches, replaced by replacement

param replacement

replacement line
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._ics_insert
documentation:
Insert **lines** in ics_program after/before **pattern**.

```
param pattern

a re.compile() pattern or a string

param offset

0 to insert before, 1 to insert after
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.origin_filepath
documentation: File in which to find info about origin of the pack.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.populate_from_tar
documentation: Populate the incremental pack with the contents of a **tar** file.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.populate_from_list_of_files_in_dir
documentation:
Populate the incremental pack with the **list_of_files** from a given **directory**.

```
param subdir

if given, populate in src/local/subdir/
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.populate_from_IALview_as_main
documentation: Populate main pack with contents from a IALview.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.populate_from_IALview_as_incremental
documentation:
Populate as incremental pack with contents from a IALview.

```
param view

a IALview instance

param start_ref

increment of modification starts from this ref.
If None, starts from latest official tagged ancestor.
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.populate_hub_from_bundle
documentation:
Populate hub from bundle.

```
param bundle

the ial_build.bundle.IALBundle object.
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.write_view_info
documentation: Write view.info into self.origin_filepath.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._populate_from_repo_in_bulk
documentation:
Populate a main pack src/local/ with the contents of a repo.

```
param subdir

if given, populate in src/local/{subdir}/

param filter_file

file in which to find list of files/dir to be filtered out
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._populate_from_repo_as_incremental_component
documentation:
Populate the incremental pack with the diff since **initial_version**
from **repository**.

```
param subdir

if given, populate in src/local/subdir/ (otherwise src/local/)
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.bundle_initial_version_of_component
documentation: In an incremenal pack, guess the initial version of **component** in the root pack.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.bundle_populate_component
documentation:
Populate src/local or hub/bundle in incr pack from bundle.

```
param bundle

the ial_build.bundle.IALBundle object.

param as_a_git_clone

if True, populates as a git clone

param filter_file

file in which to read the files to be
filtered at populate time.
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.bundle_populate
documentation:
Populate pack from bundle.

```
param bundle

the ial_build.bundle.IALBundle object.

param cleanpack

if True, call cleanpack before populating
```

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.bundle_component_destination
documentation:
Distinction between 'projects' (in src/local) and 'packages' (in hub),
as specified in bundle (attribute 'gmkpack') or parameterized.

The distinction is based on the component having a build system:
- integrated and plugged in gmkpack: package
- no build system, or not plugged in gmkpack: project

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._bundle_write_properties
documentation: Write info into self.origin_filepath.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._ignored_sources_filepath
documentation: File in which to find the sources to be ignored at compilation time.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.filter_sources_a_posteriori
documentation: Remove sources files to be filtered from src/local/ (ensuring they are in src/local).

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.read_sources_filter_list
documentation: Read the list of sources to be filtered out.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.prepare_sources_filter
documentation:
Prepare a list of source files to be filtered out,
list is read from file then expanded (wildcards, abs paths).

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack._configfile_for_sources_filtering
documentation:
Find filter file in conf, for project and optionally version.
If **version** is a list, the list is read in reverse order.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ignore_symbols_from_cycles
documentation:
Set symbols to be ignored in src/unsxref/verbose.
List of symbols picked up from pygmkpack.unsatisfied_references according to given cycles (in reverse order).

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.ignore_symbols
documentation: Set symbols to be ignored in src/unsxref/verbose.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.write_ignored_sources
documentation: Write sources to be ignored in a dedicated file.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.available_executables
documentation: Lists the available executables.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.executable_ok
documentation: Check that **program** executable has been made.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.compile
documentation: Run interactively the ics_ compilation script for **program**

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.compile_all_programs
documentation: Run interactively the ics_ compilation script for **program**

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.compile_batch
documentation:
Run in batch the ics_ compilation script for **program**, using
**batch_scheduler**

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.scanpack
documentation: List the modified files (present in local directory).

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.cleanpack
documentation: Clean .o & .mod.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.local2tar
documentation: Extract the contents of the pack to a tarfile.

methods.name: ial_build.pygmkpack.pack.Pack.rmpack
documentation: Delete pack.
